exit codes documented and distinct per failure class

acceptance_criteria: clone of a commercial fixture brick fails without entitlement and succeeds with a valid signed one
tampered entitlement rejected
doc covers issue+verify end to end
description: sma-clone.mjs: when a brick manifest carries license_tier:'commercial', require an entitlement file (JSON signed with the provenance-seal key infrastructure — reuse security/keys verify path) matching brick_id + licensee; refuse install with a clear purchase-pointer message otherwise. Document the full flow in docs/MONETIZATION_LANE.md (tag → sell → entitlement issue → clone verify), including the explicit open-core promise: nothing currently open ever moves behind the tier.
title: Entitlement verification at clone time

module gate green

acceptance_criteria: the named failure mode has a test that fails before the fix and passes after
module gate green
description: Local gates prove nothing to the curator: add a trusted intake workflow (workflow_dispatch/label-trigger) that downloads the submission bundle into an isolated job, quarantines it, re-runs gate:all + leak gate + similarity scan server-side, and posts the verdict before any curator promotion. [P8.5 skeptic finding, 2026-07-10 round 1]
title: Revalidate community submission bundles in trusted CI before curator review

acceptance_criteria: sma submit on a fixture brick produces a bundle that passes its own verification
issue template renders on GitHub
onboarding doc covers the full path
description: New tools/sma-submit.mjs: package a brick (manifest + files + attestation) into a submission bundle (schema from schemas module), run gate:all + leak gate locally, emit a ready-to-attach archive + checklist. .github/ISSUE_TEMPLATE/brick-submission.yml structures the submission; docs/community/ONBOARDING.md documents the path: submission → automated gates → curator review → promotion. First curator = repo owner.
title: Gated community brick submission lane
